sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13794" key="a)po/spondos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπόσπονδος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (σπονδή)</foreign> stronger form for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄσπονδος</foreign> (q.v.), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.30</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
